description: Billing language but actually a compliance/breach issue

input.text: I see charges on my account I didn't make. Also, when I logged in, I saw someone else's email and project data on my dashboard. I think my account was hacked and my data is exposed.

tool_output.note: No policies matched category='compliance' with keywords=['account hacked', 'data exposed', 'unauthorized charges']. This may indicate an unusual issue type. Consider lowering confidence.

tool_input.description: I see charges on my account I didn't make. Also, when I logged in, I saw someone else's email and project data on my dashboard. I think my account was hacked and my data is exposed.

tickets.description: Under GDPR, I am requesting complete deletion of all my personal data from Potens systems. My account email is john.doe@example.com. I want confirmation once this is done.
tickets.resolution: Identity verified via registered email confirmation. Data deletion request forwarded to compliance team. All PII purged from primary and backup systems within 12 days. Confirmation email sent to customer.

tickets.description: One of our former employees still has access to our Potens dashboard even though we removed them 2 weeks ago. They can still see our data. This is a serious security concern.
tickets.resolution: Investigated and found the user's session tokens were not invalidated upon removal due to a bug in the session management service. Force-invalidated all sessions for the removed user. Deployed a fix to ensure session cleanup on user removal. Notified security team.

tickets.description: We need to export all our organization's data from Potens as we're migrating to a different platform. We have approximately 800GB of data across 3 years of usage. What's the process?
tickets.resolution: Data export request processed per the Data Portability Policy. Due to the volume (800GB), coordinated with the infrastructure team for a staged export over 3 business days. Data delivered in JSON format via secure S3 bucket link.

tool_input.summary: Unauthorized account access and potential data exposure

tool_output.draft:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out. We've received your support request regarding: Unauthorized account access and potential data exposure

We recognize this is a critical issue and have flagged it for immediate attention.

Your ticket has been routed to our compliance and legal team. You can expect an initial response within 15 minutes.

If you have any additional details that might help us resolve this faster, please reply to this message.

Best regards,
Support Team

agent_output.why: The customer reports unauthorized charges and seeing someone else's data on their dashboard, indicating a potential security breach and data exposure. This is a critical issue that requires immediate attention from the compliance and legal team. Although the lookup_policy function returned 'no_matches', the search_similar_tickets function found relevant past tickets, and the draft_acknowledgment function generated a suitable response. Given the severity and potential impact on the customer's data, escalating to a manager is the most appropriate next action to ensure prompt and proper handling.
